decontamination_notes: Real feature from sympy/sympy PR #29984 (GSoC 2026), merged 2026-07-03, after model training cutoffs. Adds ground_eigenvals / ground_eigenvects to DomainMatrix. The eigenvalue SET is determined, but the result REPRESENTATION is implementation-arbitrary: eigenvalues are returned in characteristic-polynomial factorization order (not sorted), and each eigenvector basis is the specific null-space basis produced with nullspace(divide_last=False). A plausible correct-from-first-principles implementation that sorts eigenvalues or scales the eigenvector basis differently produces a valid-but-different result and fails the exact-match assertions (verified: sorted-order + default nullspace diverges from gold on the 4x4 block matrix). Repo sliced at the PR base commit (786k LOC, methods absent); LICENSE preserved. Uses the sympy-29877 image (sympy needs mpmath); runs with PYTHONPATH=.
